title: Recycling and Reclamation Workers
description: Prepare and sort materials or products for recycling. Identify and remove hazardous substances. Dismantle components of products such as appliances.

tasks.text: Sort materials, such as metals, glass, wood, paper or plastics, into appropriate containers for recycling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean recycling yard by sweeping, raking, picking up broken glass and loose paper debris, or moving barrels and bins.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate forklifts, pallet jacks, power lifts, or front-end loaders to load bales, bundles, or other heavy items onto trucks for shipping to smelters or other recycled materials processing facilities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort metals to separate high-grade metals, such as copper, brass, and aluminum, for recycling.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, inspect, or lubricate recyclable collection equipment or perform routine maintenance or minor repairs on recycling equipment, such as star gears, finger sorters, destoners, belts, and grinders.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect and sort recyclable construction materials, such as concrete, drywall, plastics, or wood, into containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Extract chemicals from discarded appliances, such as air conditioners or refrigerators, using specialized machinery, such as refrigerant recovery equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Deposit recoverable materials into chutes or place materials on conveyor belts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate balers to compress recyclable materials into bundles or bales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean materials, such as metals, according to recycling requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record logs of recycled materials or waste chemicals removed from products.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate processing equipment, such as fiber-sorters and grinders, to sort, crush, or grind recyclable materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect recyclable materials from curbside for delivery to designated facilities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate automated refuse or manual recycling collection vehicles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
